tasks.label: Bootstrap: test run (5 scenarios, no upload)
tasks.detail: Fastest sanity check. ~30 seconds. Writes training-data/bootstrap-cot.jsonl.

tasks.label: Bootstrap: full run (all scenarios, no upload)
tasks.detail: Full ~45 scenarios. ~2-3 min. Writes training-data/bootstrap-cot.jsonl for inspection.

tasks.label: Bootstrap: full run + push to Fireworks
tasks.detail: Full run then upload to Fireworks + archive to Upstash. Requires FIREWORKS_API_KEY.

tasks.label: Reddit ingest: fetch + generate + tier
tasks.detail: Reads seed-threads.txt, fetches, generates Gabriella's responses, tiers auto/review/drop.

tasks.label: Reddit ingest: finalize (merge reviewed + auto)
tasks.detail: After you've reviewed reddit-review-cot.md, run this to produce the final JSONL.

tasks.label: Reddit ingest: finalize + push to Fireworks
tasks.detail: Finalize and upload the reviewed dataset to Fireworks.

tasks.label: Export training data to JSONL (from real exchanges)
tasks.detail: Exports gauntlet-accepted real conversations into training-data/*.jsonl.

tasks.label: Dev server (npm run dev)
tasks.detail: Start Gabriella's Next.js app locally. Codespace forwards port 3000.

tasks.label: Diagnostics: check env + install
tasks.detail: Prints .env.local state, Node version, and whether groq-sdk is installed.
tasks.command: echo '=== .env.local ===' && (cat .env.local 2>/dev/null | sed 's/=.*/=<redacted>/' || echo 'MISSING — rebuild container or check Codespace secrets') && echo '' && echo '=== node version ===' && node --version && echo '' && echo '=== groq-sdk installed? ===' && (ls node_modules/groq-sdk/package.json >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo 'yes' || echo 'NO — run npm install') && echo '' && echo '=== groq pool size ===' && node --env-file=.env.local -e 'import("./lib/gabriella/groqPool.js").then(m => console.log("configured keys:", m.poolSize()))' 2>&1
